messages.content: You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We lived at the edge of the village, the last house before the trail went up into the forest. Everyone knew our house by the big pipal tree outside.
{"where": "last house at village edge, near forest trail", "place_type": "village dwelling, boundary location", "specificity": "relative, no proper name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My father's fields were on the south-facing slope, below the irrigation channel. In a good year they gave us enough rice for the whole season.
{"where": "south-facing slope below irrigation channel", "place_type": "agricultural field", "specificity": "relative, no proper name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The Ganesh temple at the corner of our lane — that was where everyone gathered before any journey. You never left without stopping there first.
{"where": "Ganesh temple at lane corner", "place_type": "temple, neighborhood landmark", "specificity": "named deity, location relative"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We moved to Kathmandu when I was twelve. I had never seen so many people or so much noise in my life.
{"where": "Kathmandu", "place_type": "capital city", "specificity": "named city"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"where": "crossroads at bottom of hill", "place_type": "crossroads, community gathering point", "specificity": "relative, no proper name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My husband's village was three hours' walk from ours, across two ridges. The first time I went there I thought I would never find my way back.
{"where": "husband's village, across two ridges, three hours' walk", "place_type": "village, relative distance", "specificity": "relative, no proper name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The river below the village was where we washed clothes, fetched water, and in summer where the children swam. It was the center of everything.
{"where": "river below the village", "place_type": "river, communal gathering place", "specificity": "relative, no proper name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I studied in Pokhara for two years. The lake was beautiful but I was always homesick for the hills.
{"where": "Pokhara", "place_type": "city, educational location", "specificity": "named city"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The old market in our bazaar, the one with the tin roof that rang like thunder when it rained — that was where my father sold his vegetables every Saturday.
{"where": "Saturday market with tin roof, local bazaar", "place_type": "market, commercial space", "specificity": "relative, described by feature"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We went on pilgrimage to Pashupatinath. My grandmother touched the stone of the temple and wept. I had never seen her cry before.
{"where": "Pashupatinath temple, Kathmandu", "place_type": "Hindu pilgrimage temple", "specificity": "named temple and city"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"where": "district headquarters hospital, one day's walk", "place_type": "hospital, district administrative center", "specificity": "relative distance, no name"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"where": "old quarter of town, narrow stone-staircase house", "place_type": "ancestral home, old town district", "specificity": "relative, described by architectural feature"}

The kitchen in our old house was separate from the sleeping rooms. It was always full of smoke but also always warm. I miss that warmth now.
{"where": "separate kitchen, family home", "place_type": "domestic space, cooking room", "specificity": "relative, no name"}

{"where": "Muktinath", "place_type": "named Hindu and Buddhist pilgrimage site", "specificity": "named site"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
